title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Jindal Steel & Power - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Jindal Steel & Power - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Jindal Steel & Power in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Jindal Steel & Power:
Jindal Steel & Power is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jindal Steel & Power!
